title: Boolean Algebra: The Mathematics of Logic
description: Master the algebraic laws governing logical operations - essential for understanding circuit optimization and the transition to quantum logic.
learningObjectives: Apply fundamental Boolean laws: identity, null, idempotent, complement
Use De Morgan's theorems to simplify expressions
Simplify Boolean expressions using algebraic manipulation
Convert between different normal forms (SOP, POS)
Understand how Boolean algebra relates to quantum operations
